messages.text: INC-006 open. Seeing object decoder precision drop after nms refactor across object-detection-service.
Recent deployment window: still checking deployment window. I am pulling the exact rollout notes now because the first symptom did not line up cleanly with one service.
Symptom reproduced on the active branch.
Recent code change aligned with the failure window.
Please avoid jumping to a root cause from one graph or one dashboard. We need the Jira comments, deploy log, and replay timing in the same timeline.
Mitigation in flight: Reverted the decode branch optimization and reran the urban replay set.
